title: dimocarpus fumatus subsp. calcicola
intro: Dimocarpus fumatus subsp. calcicola is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae and is commonly found in tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Dimocarpus fumatus subsp. calcicola typically involve infusions of the leaves or roots, which are used to make teas or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
